_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: we found AAV-K55-GFP achieved 30–40% transduction in ST88-14, 50–60% in RHT92 and over 20% in JH-2-002
details: AAV-K55-GFP achieved 50-60% transduction in RHT92 xenograft tumors as measured by flow cytometry
